content: gotta say traphase is insanely fun even if we have zero idea of what we are doing (admittedly becuz we are at low ranks)

It's just coinflip game at some point
Skills are irrelevant
as ex-ygo master duel player that's not a new complaint

i dont know why people wouldn't stop complaining about a game tbh, even after several adjustments, people still have something to complain about.

here's the summary of traphase changes since my turn era:
- cards has level system which u have to find duplicates to level up (just like clash royale), maximum lvl 15
- reduced maximum lvl from 15 to 10 because people complaining its too hard to get duplicates
- NO LEVEL at all, all things are equally at level 4

does cn like traphase

I do admit i complain a lot but tbh i wanted draft to be more skill based, but instead even if you counter pick better your opponents and such, you can lose pretty easily because of the relics, sometimes the RNG posse epr turn can mess you so badly, i had games where the opponent keep drawing 3 stagnation pierce posse for like 4 turns in a row, i couldn't properly play my deck so i couldn't reset it for better play and the opponent could just steamroll me because i can't play any cards. I wish draft didn't had those relics or have more way to snipe your cards withfor example  something like an icon that recharge based of dmg received and that let you select 1 specific card in your deck and such.
So they can't one shot 1 of your unit without any repercussions

This doesn’t feel like linear tiers
Bro also said Casiah and Karen are meta?
Blade hsr as in 300k is unreachable for me?

- Alva is at least meta level or best in slot,
- They forgot pandia can steal alienus, some units such as helot or liz AoE exalt require it for one shot so she can kind of counter them, with some wheels equipped on she can be cancerous af, not sure if you can put her in "literally satan"
- Miryam is not the best, she is niche, if enemies don't rely on buffs to damages such as Doresain then she is a brick
- if you don't have multi hit then daff + sorel aren't best in slot at all because of barrier
- Cassiah and Karen aren't meta but in Strong, they are RNG gaming, not sure if you like having to gamble for perfect debuffs or buffs
- Winkle can literally be an alienus bot in pvp for faster one shot...

The list goes on but overall, it's not to be trusted at all
“Best in slot” features more characters than slots
If I asked chatGPT and had it answer in Swahili it would give me a more coherent version than this

He’s like my #1 least favorite character to deal with that isn’t Helot because he’s just strong enough to piss me off and not strong enough that I can somehow cope myself into believing all of his wins against me are cheap ass bullshit in need of nerfs
I’ve never been so skill issued in my life
Spooky ass ghoul hands FUCK YOU PICKMAN
Oh xD
What does he do?
It seems that he works well in a paralysus team comp maybe, but i dont really know how to build that

His gimmick is that his cards are a bit over costed but they have prepare so he drops just enough poison to be a problem about halfway into the match and if he ults after hitting his paralysis it’s an obnoxious burst
seeing this is making me realize how hard it'd be to do a draft tier list
Oh, what does his ult do?
gives him his cards for free
Boogaloo then happens
like i feel like a lot of changes could be made to this but its soooo wheel/other available characters dependent
Wow, that seems quite strong

Pickman rewards patience and deliberation but doesn’t OTK quickly, everything just FEELS like it fuckin turns sideways at once. He feels better in draft where he won’t get killed by whoever’s By Rose Alone OTK turn 2 you happened to run across
yeah in draft he's nuts
Like, he just pulls them out of the deck?
nah gets copies of each for free
I think he generates copies, but that distinction is not important
Traphase deck works differently
so you can stack em with the cards he has naturally
The only thing your deck keeps track of is whether or not you’ve drawn all of your cards legitimately yet and other than that you can draw and have the same card multiple times
can throw out a 22 poison + 22 reg dmg + 33 para dmg in one turn if ur lucky
At some point it does just devolve into Pickman probably having drawn the cards he needed to kill you three turns ago for free and you’re waiting for them to stop playing cards
He’s impressively frustrating with anyone or anything that dupes cards, or that blue stone throne WoD
He gets multiple paralyzes or a lot of amp and it’s like a tooth extraction
